subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में कौन सी मंगलवाली के बीच है?
explanation_en: Raniligarh Fort is the famous fort located in Jodhpur. It is also known as Samode Fort.
